reason: The watchdog timeout pair now has a clean baseline export, exact current-build ntoskrnl string hits plus Ghidra fallback artifacts, a repo-side PoFx pseudocode lead, and a successful reboot-verified boot trace that preserved the same values after boot. That gives the candidate a credible cross-layer evidence base, but there is still no shipped app mapping, no validated non-default profile, and no direct live read of the exact values.
